name: Sensational Salad
recipeInstructions:
This salad is prepared in three steps. Follow each step before proceeding to the next.
Step 1:
- 1 med. head of napa cabbage, chopped
- 1 bunch of green onions, chopped
Combine these ingredients in a large bowl and chill until ready to prepare the rest of the salad.
Step 2:
- 2 1/2 ounces sesame seeds
- 1 package almonds, sliced
- 2 packages Chinese noodles, broken small
- 2 cloves garlic
- oil
Break the noodles into tiny pieces while still in the bags. Remove the seasoning pack and discard it.
Heat a pan with oil over medium heat. Add the broken noodles, sesame seeds, and garlic. Stir-fry until lightly browned. Season with salt and pepper. Store in the refrigerator.
Step 3:
- 2 tablespoons soy sauce
- 3/4 cup rice wine vinegar
- 1/2 cup sugar
- 1/4 cup oil
Combine all ingredients in a bowl. Bring to a boil for no more than one minute, then remove from heat and let cool. Store in the refrigerator.
Just before serving, combine all sections gently and toss together. Optional additions include mandarin oranges or cooked chicken.
